find.why: You should meet Jackson, as his unique perspective on creativity will inspire you to explore new ways of making people feel something truly meaningful.
find.match_belief: People change when they see their own lives reflected back clearer than memory allows.

profile.belief: Leaving silence for the listener's own memory to fill isn't lazy—it's trusting them with the truth they already know.
profile.working_on: podcast-length ghost narrative with zero music, only ambience and the listener's own breathing as anchor

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep belief in the power of personal reflection, inviting listeners to confront their own truths in stillness.
